who: accounting firms managing petty cash for 5–15 clients/month
offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients/month, manual reconciliation causes late financial reporting. We automate petty cash reconciliation instead of manual tracking and reconciliation spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation of petty cash transactions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try weekly summary reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
